title: Phase 2 Synthesis — Descent Status After 15-Session Attack

analysis.object: T776: Phase 2 Synthesis — Descent Status After 15-Session Attack depth analysis

proved_smooth.description: T775: descent proved for smooth projective varieties

proved_abelian.description: T770: descent proved for all abelian varieties via CM + lattice theory

proved_toric.description: T771: descent trivially proved for toric varieties

proved_p_n.description: T769: descent trivially proved for projective space

remaining_gap.description: Remaining: singular proper varieties (Case 3 of T774) -- Hironaka resolution may not preserve Hodge class
remaining_gap.reason: Resolution changes the variety -- Hodge class may not descend

hironaka_hodge.description: Does Hodge class pull back correctly under Hironaka resolution?
hironaka_hodge.reason: Pullback of Hodge classes under blow-up -- standard question

t776_synthesis.description: T776: PHASE 2 SYNTHESIS. Smooth projective descent = PROVED (T775). Singular case = one sub-question: do Hodge classes pull back under resolution? If yes, FULL DESCENT PROVED.
t776_synthesis.reason: The gap is now a single question about Hodge class behavior under blow-up

analysis.theorem: T776: Phase 2 Synthesis — Descent Status After 15-Session Attack (S1055).

key_theorem: T776: Phase 2 Synthesis — Descent Status After 15-Session Attack (S1055).
